groups.name: Modern American Canasta
groups.notes: Scraped Mar 17 10:30 PM - 5 new entries! FB075 (Amy Beer Brown, courtesy rule: special hand after partner opens - yes on next turn only, 14 comments). FB076 (Amy Beer Brown, can't close 7 canasta when only wilds left - must discard 7, 14 comments unanimous). FB077 (David Grant, strategy: dump 7s and go out to trap opponents with 3s, 11 comments unanimous). FB078 (Mary Fiore Top contributor, can't pick tray for splash/special hand - admin definitive answer with definitions, 19 comments). FB079 (Jean Ann, second team gets 3-card talon not 4, 6 comments unanimous). Skipped: Fran Sher (printable special hands resource request), Alan Bakst (CanastaMatch lessons promo), MAC admin (Learn to Teach promo), Patricia Title Doniger x2 (LFG Rye NY).
